checks.description: Ensure dout_valid does not toggle spuriously when din_valid is low.
checks.pass_condition: dout_valid remains 0 while din_valid is 0, regardless of din_serial changes.
checks.trigger_condition: When din_valid is low for consecutive cycles.

checks.description: Validate that after eight consecutive din_valid=1 cycles, dout_parallel reflects the transmitted bits MSB first and dout_valid becomes 1.
checks.pass_condition: After the clock edge following the eighth valid input, dout_parallel equals the concatenated bits [din_serial_7 ... din_serial_0] and dout_valid is 1; before that dout_valid is 0.
checks.trigger_condition: When a sequence of eight din_valid=1 inputs has been applied.
